Label: Moderate Institutional Trust
Description: This segment shows high trust in the president, armed forces, and supreme court, while maintaining moderate trust (concentrated at 4 and 5) across most other national institutions. Trust is notably lower for political parties and the national police.

Label: Generalized Institutional Distrust
Description: This segment is characterized by very high probabilities of 'Nada' (not at all) across almost all institutions, most notably for political parties (0.85) and the national police (0.76). The only relative exceptions are the president and armed forces, which show more distributed responses and higher probabilities for positive trust levels compared to other items.

Label: Presidential and Military Trust
Description: This segment is characterized by high trust in the president and armed forces, contrasted with strong distrust of political parties and the national police.

Label: Broad High Institutional Trust
Description: This segment is characterized by very high trust across nearly all institutions, with the highest probabilities of 'Mucho' (a lot) for the president (0.82), public ministry (0.74), and armed forces (0.72). Trust is slightly more distributed for political parties and the media, though still leaning toward higher trust levels.

Label: Concentrated High Institutional Trust
Description: This segment expresses high levels of trust across all institutions, with the strongest probabilities concentrated on the 5, 6, and 7 ratings, particularly for the president, armed forces, and supreme court.
